summary: End-to-end backend + frontend smoke testing of Leomote. 16/17 backend pytest cases passing (1 intermittent LLM-budget 500 on /api/ai/keywords). All major frontend routes load with data-testid hooks; signup -> dashboard -> protected pages all work; admin login + overview + KPI render. Two minor data-testid naming mismatches found vs spec.

critical.issue: When Emergent LLM budget is exhausted or LLM call fails, endpoints return 500 (unhandled emergentintegrations.ChatError). Should be wrapped in try/except and return 502/503 with friendly message.

minor.issue: Returns flattened quota fields (ats_quota/ai_quota/ats_used/ai_used) instead of nested 'quotas' object as documented in the review request. Consumers must be aware of the flat shape.
months[] series duplicates 'Jan' multiple times because the loop uses `now - i*30 days` instead of true month boundaries; causes React duplicate-key warnings on admin charts.

ui_bugs.issue: Wrapper uses data-testid='admin-subs-page' but spec/route lookup expects 'admin-subscriptions-page'.
Cards use data-testid='plan-{id}' but request mentions 'plan-card-{id}'. subscribe-{id} buttons work fine.

integration_issues.issue: Console error: 'Encountered two children with the same key, Jan' — caused by backend overview months[] containing duplicate 'Jan' (see admin overview bug above).

action_items: Wrap LLM calls in routes_ai.py / ai_service.py with try/except and return 502/503 instead of 500 when emergentintegrations raises ChatError (covers budget exceeded and transient LLM errors).
Fix /api/admin/overview month-bucketing to use proper calendar months so labels are unique (currently month_start = now - i*30 days, days=1 produces duplicate 'Jan' multiple times).
Rename admin-subs-page -> admin-subscriptions-page and admin-notif-page -> admin-notifications-page (or update spec/tests). Same for plan-{id} vs plan-card-{id}.
critical_code_review_comments: routes_ai.py: every LLM endpoint trusts ai_service to succeed; any LLM exception bubbles up as 500. Add a shared wrapper so the UI gets actionable error messages.
routes_admin.py overview: month bucketing logic with i*30 days is incorrect for calendar months; produces duplicate month names and inaccurate growth/revenue series.

routes_payments.py verify_payment: amount is not re-verified against the order; a client could pass any plan in /verify body and get upgraded. Should look up the original payment doc by razorpay_order_id and use its plan/amount rather than trusting the request body.

routes_auth.py /session: cookie set with samesite='none' + secure=True is correct for cross-site but only works over HTTPS; preview URL is HTTPS so OK. Note that /auth/me only accepts Bearer JWT and ignores the session_token cookie, so OAuth users need the JWT issued by the /session response — already handled.
test_credentials: Admin: admin@leomote.ai / Admin@2026 (seeded). Test users created on-the-fly via /api/auth/signup with TEST_ prefix.
seed_data_creation: Test resumes, applications, payments, and users created with TEST_ prefix during run; not cleaned up to keep dashboards populated for next iteration.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite at /app/backend/tests/test_leomote.py is the regression suite — run with `cd /app/backend && python -m pytest tests/test_leomote.py -v`. The block_unblock_flow test changes the test user's is_blocked state, so always run as a full suite (fixtures are session-scoped). LLM-backed tests (ai_keywords/rewrite/interview/ats_analyze) can fail with 500 when the Emergent LLM key hits its $0.001 budget cap — retry after a few minutes if intermittent.
rca of the issue: The /api/ai/keywords 500 traces to emergentintegrations.llm.chat.ChatError raised inside ai_service._ask when litellm returns BadRequestError 'Budget has been exceeded'. routes_ai.ai_keywords does not catch this exception so FastAPI returns a generic 500. Mitigation: wrap _ask (or each route handler) in try/except ChatError and raise HTTPException(status_code=503, detail='AI service temporarily unavailable').
